title: BEM-865 direct queue process
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
result_file = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
processed.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
result_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if queue.exists():
    data = json.loads(queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    # Do not call external shell from restricted executor. Mark exact blocker for actual dispatch layer.
    result_file.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'DISPATCH_BLOCKED_IN_RESTRICTED_EXECUTOR','reason':'restricted executor cannot call gh workflow run directly','workflow':data.get('workflow'),'ref':data.get('ref'),'inputs':data.get('inputs')}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    processed.write_text(queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')
    queue.unlink()
    status = 'QUEUE_MOVED_TO_PROCESSED_DISPATCH_BLOCKED'
else:
    status = 'QUEUE_NOT_FOUND'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_DIRECT_QUEUE_PROCESS_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 direct queue process\nStatus: ' + status + '\nResult: governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json\nProcessed: governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
changed_files.append(str(processed))
changed_files.append(str(result_file))
ops_applied.append('direct queue process: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
